name: certs-dir
description: Directory containing the TLS certificates for the Core.

name: ca-key
description: Path to the CA private key file, relative to certs-dir.

name: ca-cert
description: Path to the CA certificate file, relative to certs-dir.

name: node-key
description: Path to the node private key file, relative to certs-dir.

name: node-cert
description: Path to the node certificate file, relative to certs-dir.

name: allow-key-reuse
description: Allow reusing existing CA keys when generating certificates.

name: key-size
description: Size (in bits) used when generating new certificate keys.
